macro: Atlas remains in a risk-off weekend regime: oil above $100, sticky yields, and only 2/15 watchlist names above both key trend checkpoints keep the burden of proof on bulls.
policy: The March FOMC window is still a cap on aggressive risk-taking; without cooler oil and lower yields, any rebound in semis or AI should be treated as tactical rather than durable.
delta: No macro all-clear arrived after Friday: the same oil-to-rates pressure chain persisted, while PLTR and RDW remained the clearest relative-strength pockets inside an otherwise fragile board.
